comparison.title: What to keep in mind when choosing.
comparison.description: When reviewing platforms or brokers, several practical aspects are usually compared, which we summarize below.
comparison.note: These elements help create a clearer view of how platforms differ from one another and which one may offer a more suitable service.

heatmap.description: The heat map lets you quickly visualize which assets, sectors or markets are seeing the most activity and how movements are distributed across the market.

decision.subtitle: Broker selection happens in three steps.

homePage.heroDescription: Find the platform, bank or broker that best matches your profile and needs.
homePage.introQuestionLineOne: When you start looking for a company that offers you an
homePage.introQuestionLineTwo: investment service, the first question is usually:
homePage.introBodyPrimary: Finding the answer usually means spending a lot of time across different websites, reading reviews and descriptions that are often unclear or unfamiliar.
homePage.introBodySecondary: At Silecta, we help make the choice simple and convenient by guiding you through the process so you can decide with a clearer perspective.

platform.title: Independent structure
platform.lead: Silecta is an independent resource dedicated to organizing broker information and industry developments.
platform.body: It does not act as a broker or manage trading accounts. Its purpose is to present information about different options within a clearer structure that makes exploration and comparison easier.

maria.name: Maria A.
maria.quote: Execution conditions and fees are easy to understand without jumping between websites.

javier.name: Javier P.
javier.quote: I looked at four brokers in no time. Structured comparison helps you decide without rushing.

lucia.name: Lucia O.
lucia.quote: Silecta doesn't try to sell me anything. It organizes the information and lets me choose calmly.

reviews.description: Broker platforms are often discussed on independent review platforms where traders share their experiences.
reviews.note: These external perspectives can provide additional support when understanding and evaluating a service before making a choice.
reviews.title: External perspectives from trading communities

updates.eyebrow: The global market moves forward, and so do we.
updates.description: Stay informed about platform changes. Explore new tools, news updates and changes in market access.

article01.alt: Invierte a largo y corto plazo.
article01.label: Artículo 01
article01.title: Invierte a largo y corto plazo.
article01.body: Elige una Plataforma que te permita adaptar tu inversión en función de tus necesidades ya sean a largo o corto plazo que aumente tus posibilidades de obtener rentabilidad.

article02.alt: Realiza aportaciones o reinvierte beneficios con comodidad.
article02.label: Artículo 02
article02.title: Realiza aportaciones o reinvierte beneficios con comodidad.
article02.body: Las herramientas analíticas ayudan a los inversores a revisar características clave de las plataformas, como los costes de tarifas, las condiciones y el tiempo de ejecución.

article03.alt: Invierte y paga comisiones bajas por ello.
article03.label: Artículo 03
article03.title: Invierte y paga comisiones bajas por ello.
article03.body: El activo más rentable es pagar comisiones bajas por realizar tu inversión, no puedes controlar si el mercado sube o baja, pero si puedes controlar lo que pagas por ello.

homePage.brokersTitle: Know your real options before deciding.
homePage.brokersFooter: See whether any of these companies can meet your needs with clear, fast and precise information. Review their services, costs and products in a single click.
homePage.workSecurityDescription: We use cutting edge technologies to secure your transactions.
homePage.workPlatformDescription: The platform is built for your convenience, based on time saving and easy to use methods.
homePage.workSupportDescription: A highly experienced customer support staff is at your disposal for any issue you may have.
homePage.heroTitle: Cryptocurrency has never been that simple
homePage.heroSubtitle: Sign up and exchange BTC & ETH!
homePage.converterDescription: Make an exchange with an incredible speed
homePage.plansDescription: Exchange swiftly and securely. At Silecta, all of your funds are transferred using the safest possible methods.
homePage.faqPersonalDataEncryptionBody: Your personal information is completely encrypted with cutting-edge technologies.
homePage.faqComplianceBody: We verify our client’s identity at the highest level of compliance through AML and KYC checks.
homePage.faqTransactionSecurityBody: We are always one step ahead! Our multi-layer security protocol ensures the highest standards of client safety.
homePage.faqKycTitle: Why do I need to pass the KYC check?
homePage.faqKycBody: KYC verification helps us manage risks by verifying that every customer using our platform is not a risk to us or, more importantly, to you.
homePage.faqKycBodySecondary: KYC is developed to avoid the risk of identity theft, money laundering, financial fraud, and criminal organisation financing.
homePage.faqSupportBody: We are here six days a week, from Monday till Saturday 10:00 – 02:00 GMT+3. On all other hours, you can email the support, and we will be in contact with you in less than 24 hours.
homePage.faqDescription: Our KYC process is simple and secure:
homePage.servicesBody: Your privacy and security is our main objective. We have developed an impeccable safeguard system that excellently counters any threat to your data, funds, and transactions.
homePage.startStepOne: Sign up and verify your email
homePage.approachBodyPrimary: Every transaction is carefully screened and reviewed, not only for the platform's security but also for yours.
homePage.approachBodySecondary: Silecta offers a cryptocurrency exchange that is guaranteed safe, efficient and convenient. Anyone, whether new or experienced, may buy and sell crypto at competitive rates and in a 'worry-free' environment, thanks to the technologies we deploy.
homePage.solutionsDescription: Your privacy and security are our main objectives.

calculator.subtitle: How much could your investment grow over time?
calculator.title: Investment calculator
calculator.bodyPrimary: Before choosing an investment platform, many users want to understand how their savings could evolve over the long term. This calculator lets you explore different scenarios using an initial capital, an estimated return and a set time period.
calculator.bodySecondary: Adjust the values and see how small changes can influence the final result over the years.
calculator.footer: Simulations can help you better understand the impact of compound growth and provide additional perspective when comparing investment platforms and financial services.

AboutPageBroaderView.subtitle: A broader view of the trading environment
AboutPageBroaderView.title: Trading services continue to change as trading technology evolves and market access expands.
AboutPageBroaderView.description: Platforms introduce new instruments, update trading software and adjust account features over time. Following these developments can provide additional context when reviewing broker platforms and their operating environments.
AboutPageBroaderView.rightDesciption: If you need clarification while exploring broker platforms or using analytical tools, you can get in touch through the contact page.

AboutPageHero.subtitle: SILECTA · ABOUT
AboutPageHero.title: A place where research comes together
AboutPageHero.description: Broker research often requires checking multiple sources. Silecta brings broker information and industry context together in one place to make exploration easier.

AboutPageInformation.subtitle: What information is usually reviewed
AboutPageInformation.title: The key elements traders examine when exploring broker platforms.
AboutPageInformation.description: When traders explore broker platforms, attention usually focuses on several practical aspects of the platform environment.
AboutPageInformation.itemDescriptionOne: Order-processing systems and the technical environment that supports trade execution.
AboutPageInformation.itemDescriptionTwo: Spreads, commissions, financing costs and other parameters related to trading activity.
AboutPageInformation.itemDescriptionThree: Availability of trading software across web, mobile and desktop environments.
AboutPageInformation.itemDescriptionFour: Experiences shared by traders on external review platforms.

AboutPageInvestigation.subtitle: A platform designed for exploration
AboutPageInvestigation.title: Research rarely follows a strict order.
AboutPageInvestigation.descriptionOne: One user may start by reviewing listings, while another may begin with analytical tools or industry observations.
AboutPageInvestigation.descriptionTwo: Because research paths differ, Silecta allows movement between sections without imposing a fixed sequence.
AboutPageInvestigation.listDescription: Silecta operates as an independent broker discovery platform. The service does not open trading accounts, hold client funds, execute trades or provide investment advice. Our role is limited to:

AboutPageProcess.subtitle: Why organization changes the research process
AboutPageProcess.descriptionOne: Broker platforms rarely present information in the same way. Trading costs may appear on one page, platform capabilities on another and market access in technical documentation.
AboutPageProcess.descriptionTwo: When these elements are reviewed within the same framework, differences between platforms become easier to identify.
AboutPageProcess.descriptionThree: That is the principle behind Silecta: keeping broker information within a consistent environment where platforms can be explored without constantly switching formats.

AboutPageResources.subtitle: One environment, multiple perspectives
AboutPageResources.title: Three resources integrated into a single platform.
AboutPageResources.itemDescriptionOne: Structured profiles that present trading platforms in a single overview.
AboutPageResources.itemDescriptionTwo: Articles covering platform developments, infrastructure updates and environmental changes.
AboutPageResources.itemDescriptionThree: Interactive tools that let users examine trading parameters and strategy assumptions.

sectorUpdatesPage.exploreBody: Industry observations can provide additional context when reviewing broker platforms. Continue your research by exploring broker listings and analytical tools available on the platform.
sectorUpdatesPage.heroDescription: Understand how broker platforms evolve over time, from technology changes to shifts in trading infrastructure and platform environments.
sectorUpdatesPage.servicesBodyPlatformUpdates: Trading software evolves with new features, interface updates and improved execution environments.
sectorUpdatesPage.servicesBodyNewTools: Platforms introduce additional analytical tools, automation features and platform utilities.
sectorUpdatesPage.servicesBodyMarketAccess: Investors may gradually gain access to new asset classes such as stocks, ETFs, cryptocurrencies or derivatives.
sectorUpdatesPage.servicesBodyAdjustments: Account structures, platform capabilities and available features may change as platforms refine their services.
sectorUpdatesPage.servicesTitle: Reliable services in the long term
sectorUpdatesPage.servicesDescription: Broker platforms often expand and adjust their services as trading technology and market access evolve. Over time, these changes may include:

step1.title: Explore brokers
step1.body: Start by getting to know the most widely used platforms with the strongest market conditions. The Find a broker section brings platform profiles together in one place. Each profile presents the key elements of a brokerage environment in a consistent format, making it easier to review and move between platforms.

step2.title: Go beyond the listing
step2.body: Broker research rarely stops at the basic profile. The Tools section offers analytical utilities that help interpret trading conditions. At the same time, Industry updates tracks platform-related changes, including new features, adjustments and changes in market access.

step3.title: See the differences
step3.body: After exploring listings and reviewing the context, the next step is to see how platforms differ. Users usually focus on the following aspects:

step4.title: Continue your research
step4.body: Once a platform catches your attention, you can continue exploring it directly. Silecta does not open accounts, manage transactions or take part in trading activity. The service focuses on organizing broker information so users can review platforms before proceeding on their own.

hero.title: How it works.
hero.description: Follow the process investors use when exploring platforms and discover how Silecta organizes information to make research clearer and more structured.

intro.title: Silecta brings together platform listings, market context and practical tools.
intro.body: Silecta brings together platform listings, market context and practical tools so users can move forward with research in a clearer and more structured way. The process unfolds in four steps described below.

explore.lead: Broker research rarely follows a single path. Some users quickly identify the platforms they want to explore further, while others spend more time reviewing tools, industry updates and platform details before deciding where to focus next.
explore.body: The platform structure allows users to move freely between sections as their research evolves.

selection.body: Silecta operates as an independent broker discovery and comparison platform. It does not hold client funds or provide investment advice. Its role is limited to presenting broker information, tools and industry context within a clearer research structure.

contact.title: Here to help.
contact.description: If you prefer direct communication, you can get in touch with the team using the contact details below.
contact.privacyBody: Your contact information will only be used to respond to your enquiry. Silecta does not share personal information with third parties.

hero.title: Let's talk.
hero.description: Questions may come up while exploring broker listings, reviewing platform information or navigating different sections of the website. If anything on the platform needs clarification, you can contact the team directly.

FindABrokerPageHero.title: Find a broker
FindABrokerPageHero.description: Explore different platforms through organized listings and structured broker profiles.

FindABrokerPageBrokerListings.title: Broker listings
FindABrokerPageBrokerListings.description: Explore available platforms and review their environments through a single overview. Each listing presents key details, making it possible to compare different options within the same structure.

FindABrokerPlatforms.title: Stay up to date with platforms
FindABrokerPlatforms.description: Broker services and trading environments continue to evolve. Following industry developments can provide additional context when exploring investment platforms.

FindABrokerPagePlatformSelect.title: Silecta as an independent platform
FindABrokerPagePlatformSelect.description: The platform focuses on organizing broker information so users can explore brokerage and investment platforms before continuing their research directly with a broker.

FindABrokerPageReviewing.title: What to look for when reviewing brokers
FindABrokerPageReviewing.description: When exploring platform listings, investors usually pay attention to several practical aspects of a platform. These elements help create a clearer picture of how investment environments differ.
FindABrokerPageReviewing.itemDescriptionOne: Infrastructure that supports order processing and trading operations.
FindABrokerPageReviewing.itemDescriptionTwo: Spreads, commissions and standard account-related charges.
FindABrokerPageReviewing.itemDescriptionThree: Availability of trading software across web, desktop and mobile devices.
FindABrokerPageReviewing.itemDescriptionFour: Reviews shared by traders on independent platforms.

FindABrokerPageTools.title: Tools for broker research
FindABrokerPageTools.description: In addition to broker listings, our platform offers analytical tools that help users review trading conditions and the platform environment from a different perspective.

toolsPage.ctaBody: Analytical tools can complement broker listings and the industry information available on the platform.
toolsPage.heroDescription: Analytical tools available to help examine trading environments, platform conditions and possible strategy scenarios.
toolsPage.toolsTitle: Four tools for exploring trading conditions and strategy assumptions.

card1.title: Capital projection calculator
card1.description: Estimate how capital may change over time based on the starting balance, additional contributions and assumed return.

card2.title: Risk-per-trade estimate
card2.description: Estimate potential exposure per trade based on account balance and the selected risk percentage.

card3.title: Cost application
card3.description: Review how spreads, commissions and trade size affect the total cost of a trade.

card4.title: Strategy results simulator
card4.description: Simulate possible outcomes across a series of trades based on win rate and risk-reward ratio.

toolsPage.usageLead: These utilities allow users to examine different parameters related to trading environments and strategy assumptions.
toolsPage.usageBody: They are designed to support research and scenario exploration, not to provide investment advice.
